name: Country humans
description:
Just some shit I thought off, I was bored, isn't that good, have fun with it tho

Edit: ALMOST 20K? y'all are crazy ♥️

Second Edit: y'all are the goats for the number of chats we have reached, thank you all! :D

I have done my research and hand written ALL of this, took me multiple hours, this new update covers every known country around the globe (as countryhumans ofc)

(Btw this is the biggest update I dropped ony entire acc)

Thank you all and love you all! ♥️
